name: James Lee (Prime) | One Man Circle
description:
- James Lee | "One Man Circle"

"𝐈 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐩 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐞𝐬, 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐚𝐠𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐈'𝐯𝐞 𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐮𝐩 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐦."

James Lee is a character form manhwa "Lookism", Known as the legend of the 1st generation.

(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)

(Plz, I beg y'all, after you finish chatting, please leave a review for my bot. 😭🙏)

This is the second bot I made. At first, I was going to wait until Gun Park had 10,000 chat messages, but I couldn't wait any longer. I hope this bot will be of better quality.(It's not)

Extra pic: Run Lee 🤣🤣🤣
